fields.label: MDP Widget Config (JSON)
fields.name: mdp_json_config
fields.instructions:
This expects JSON data for configuring the widget, supporting all options documented for the MDP JS Widget (fields, sections, resourceLimits, resourcePermissions, and more). Please do not modify unless you know what you are doing.

Note: rootEl, apiRoot, accessToken, and personId/orgId are always set automatically and any value provided for them here is ignored.

See full documentation for MDP JS Widgets.

fields.label: MDP JSON Fields (Deprecated)
fields.name: mdp_json_fields
fields.instructions: This expects JSON data for the fields property as defined here: https://wicket-core.s3.ca-central-1.amazonaws.com/wicket-widgets-readme-staging.html#createpersonprofile. Please do not modify unless you know what you are doing. This must be valid JSON, otherwise this field is ignored. Superseded by the MDP Widget Config setting above — if that is set, this value is ignored entirely. A "Copy this value into MDP Widget Config" link appears below this field in the editor to copy it over pre-formatted.

fields.label: MDP JSON Sections (Deprecated)
fields.name: mdp_json_sections
fields.instructions: This expects JSON data for the sections property (address / email / phone / web field config) as defined here: https://wicket-core.s3.ca-central-1.amazonaws.com/wicket-widgets-readme-staging.html#addresssectionconfig. Please do not modify unless you know what you are doing. This must be valid JSON, otherwise this field is ignored. Superseded by the MDP Widget Config setting above — if that is set, this value is ignored entirely.
